name: ArcherSquid
title: General & Warlord — Returned
note: When Stromgarde was left to die by its founders, ArcherSquid arrived — new to the server, hungry for conquest. He rebuilt the town from nothing, recruited Teyuh and Inapplicable, and forged a PvP alliance powerful enough to overpower Iblis, the dominant force in Kalros. His return to Loka is not a comeback. It is a reckoning.

name: Inapplicable
title: General & Architect — Keeper of the Fort
note: While others moved on to new continents and new wars, Inapplicable stayed. For years he held Stromgarde together through inactivity, political pressure, and the slow creep of Iblis reclaiming Kalros. The walls still stand because of him. Now, with ArcherSquid returning, the sleeping giant of the north is waking up — and the server will remember what Stromgarde means.
